input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.1.3
            TITLE: no agents other than the provided fuel and air may go into the combustion chamber.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.1.3: No agents other than the provided fuel and air may go into the combustion chamber.
IC.5.1.3 No agents other than the provided fuel and air may go into the combustion chamber.

final_answer: No agents other than the provided fuel and air may go into the combustion chamber.
